wine_retailers.name: Kloster Eberbach Wein- und Klostershop
wine_retailers.description: Wine shop and monastery shop in the former wine press of Kloster Eberbach, selling the Hessische Staatsweinguter range across 200 hectares from Steinberg, Rauenthal, Bergstrasse and Assmannshausen.
wine_retailers.speciality: Hessische Staatsweinguter wines from Steinberg, Rauenthal, Bergstrasse and Assmannshausen domains

wine_retailers.name: Vinothek Laquai Wiesbaden
wine_retailers.description: Wine shop and bar of Weingut Laquai of Lorch in the Wiesbaden Mauergasse pedestrian zone, opened 2020 after a full renovation of a 125-year-old building. Around 30 estate Rieslings, Pinots and Sekt.
wine_retailers.speciality: Weingut Laquai Lorch wines: Riesling, Pinot family and Sekt; certified Rheingau Vinothek

wine_retailers.name: Balthasar Ress Vinothek Wiesbaden
wine_retailers.description: Urban vinothek and wine shop of Weingut Balthasar Ress in the Wiesbaden pedestrian zone, open since April 2013. Bottle sales at estate prices alongside by-the-glass pours of the Hattenheim range.
wine_retailers.speciality: Balthasar Ress VDP Rheingau range and selected partner growers at estate prices

wine_retailers.name: Schloss Johannisberg Vinothek and Wine Shop
wine_retailers.description: On-site wine shop of Schloss Johannisberg above Geisenheim, with the entire estate Riesling range. The Subterranean Library underneath holds the estate's oldest bottles dating back to 1748.
wine_retailers.speciality: Schloss Johannisberg estate Riesling across Gelblack, Rotlack, Grünlack and Goldlack tiers

wine_retailers.name: Schloss Vollrads Wine Shop
wine_retailers.description: Estate shop at Schloss Vollrads in the orangery courtyard, selling the 100 percent Riesling range of the 800-year-old estate alongside Sekt and the estate's own merchandise.
wine_retailers.speciality: Schloss Vollrads Riesling across Gutswein, Ortswein and Grosse Lage tiers, plus Sekt

verified.address_quoted: Schloss Vollrads GmbH & Co. Besitz KG | 65375 Oestrich-Winkel | Germany

wine_retailers.name: Weingut Robert Weil Wine Shop
wine_retailers.description: Estate wine shop at the foot of the Kiedricher Graefenberg, selling the Robert Weil VDP Riesling range from estate dry to noble-sweet Trockenbeerenauslese and the rare Eiswein bottlings.
wine_retailers.speciality: Robert Weil estate Riesling across dry Grosses Gewaechs and noble-sweet tiers from the Kiedricher Graefenberg

wine_retailers.name: Weinland Rheingau eG Cooperative Shop
wine_retailers.address: Erbacher Strasse 25, 65343 Eltville am Rhein, Germany
wine_retailers.description: Wine shop of the Weinland Rheingau cooperative in Eltville-Erbach, with bottles from member growers across the Rheingau covering Riesling, Pinot Noir and Sekt at cooperative prices.
wine_retailers.speciality: Cooperative-member Rheingau Riesling, Pinot Noir and Sekt sourced across the region

wine_retailers.name: Asbach Visitor Centre Shop
wine_retailers.address: Ingelheimer Strasse 4, 65385 Ruedesheim am Rhein, Germany
wine_retailers.description: Retail shop at the Asbach Visitor Centre in Ruedesheim selling the full Asbach brandy and liqueur range, including Uralt, Privatbrand and seasonal expressions, plus tasting tickets.
wine_retailers.speciality: Asbach brandy, Uralt, Privatbrand and seasonal liqueurs from the Ruedesheim distillery
